title: Tax Compliance Risks for Foreigners in Vietnam
metaDescription: An insightful webinar for foreign individuals and businesses in Vietnam on tax compliance obligations and risk mitigation strategies, hosted by InCorp Vietnam in collaboration with Baker & McKenzie.
about: Join us for an insightful webinar designed for foreign individuals and businesses operating in Vietnam, led by InCorp Vietnam's experts in collaboration with Baker & McKenzie. Gain a comprehensive understanding of Vietnam's tax landscape, learn about key tax compliance obligations, and discover strategies to mitigate risks.
This webinar is a must-attend for foreign investors, business owners, and expatriates who wish to stay compliant and reduce tax liabilities in Vietnam.

details.label: Format
details.value: Webinar — Zoom link provided upon registration

speakers.name: Mr. Hùng Nguyễn
speakers.role: Head of Business Development & HR & Payroll, InCorp Vietnam
speakers.label: Speaker

bulletSections.heading: What We Will Cover
items: Overview of tax compliance for foreigners in Vietnam
PIT and CIT obligations for foreigners and businesses
Work permit and government black list issues
Recent updates on tax laws and regulations

registration.heading: Reserve Your Spot
registration.subtitle: Join our exclusive webinar to get the latest insights on tax compliance in Vietnam.
